news.title: Gold prices today, Monday, June 15: Gold moves higher following U.S., Iran ceasefire agreement
news.description: Gold August futures opened at $4,289.40 per troy ounce on Monday, up 1.2% from Friday’s closing price of $4,238.80. Gold moved even higher in early trading, rising to $4,360.40 by 6:50 a.m. ET.
